behavior patterns: behavioral symptoms - verbally abusive behavioral symptoms - behavior symptom frequency. 0 = Behavior not exhibited in last 30 days, 1 = Behavior of this type occurred 1 to 3 days in last 7 days, 2 = Behavior of this type occurred 4 to 6 days, but less than daily, 3 = Behavior of this type occurred daily, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
179 E4BB E4BB_VRBL_ABUS_ALT (E4BB) Verbally Abusive Alterability CHAR 1 Mood and behavior patterns: behavioral symptoms - verbally abusive
